title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE VILLASIS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN VILLASIS, PANGASINAN, TO DON RAMON E. COSTALES MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 5706 / 85 OG No. 41, 6256 (Oct. 9, 1989)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6737, August 04, 1989 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE VILLASIS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN VILLASIS, PANGASINAN, TO DON RAMON E. COSTALES MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Villasis National High School in Villasis, Pangasinan, shall, upon the effectivity of this Act, be known and referred to as the Don Ramon E. Costales Memorial National High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 7, 1989 and June 8, 1989, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.)

QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House of Representatives

Approved: August 4, 1989

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
